description: A multi-chapter work (book, lecture notes, tutorial) whose content lives in a single pijul repository. Chapter division and order come from the repo's layout (`chapters/*.{typ,md,...}`) — there are no per-chapter at-protocol records. External AppViews clone `pijulRepoUrl` to get the complete series plus version history. Interactions on individual chapters (vote, bookmark, comment) reference the series URI plus a `sectionRef` (chapter TID) to retain per-chapter granularity without fragmenting PDS writes.

seriesId.description: Stable series id, used as the rkey.

pijulRepoUrl.description: Public knot URL hosting the series repo, e.g. https://knot.example.com/did:web:alice/series_<seriesId>
